movie.actors: Sylvester Stallone, Richard Crenna, Marc de Jonge, Kurtwood Smith
movie.plot: Rambo mounts a one-man mission to rescue his friend Colonel Trautman from the clutches of the formidable invading Soviet forces in Afghanistan.
movie.title: Rambo III
movie.writer: David Morrell (characters), Sylvester Stallone, Sheldon Lettich
